title: โซลาร์เซลล์ — On Grid / Off Grid / Hybrid

trimAuto.reasoning: Dropped 10s of pre-roll recording-test chatter ('อันนี้มันอัดแล้วนะครับ ลองดูครับ') + 5s trailing banter + stutter-duplicated terms (Off Grid, Hybrid said twice — kept last take)

notes: Fourth job through the v88 pipeline. First job to use the refactored Template 01 (generic paths — no manual path-fixing needed; set-duration.py + build-burst-captions.py + add-broll.py only). Solar-cell explainer: 3 installation types.
